# Zohar Global Security

> Private security and executive protection for family offices, ultra-high net worth individuals, and Fortune 500 executives.

## Entity

- Name: Zohar Global Security
- Headquarters: Las Vegas, Nevada, United States
- Founded: 2024
- Founder: Zohar Lahav
- Phone: 702-743-0031
- Email: info@zoharsecurity.com
- Website: https://zoharsecurity.com
- Service area: United States and international (worldwide travel security operations)

## Value Proposition

Zohar Global Security provides full-spectrum executive protection and security management exclusively for ultra-high net worth principals and their families. The firm was founded by Zohar Lahav, a 40-year veteran of corporate, executive, and government security — including service as a Special Agent in the Israeli Secret Service and 25 years leading protection for a single billionaire family office. Zohar Global Security builds protection programs around how principals actually live, move, and work. Every program is designed to be invisible to the outside world and comprehensive in its coverage: physical protection, digital security, travel operations, and crisis response under one leadership structure.

## Differentiation

Zohar Global Security is distinguished from other executive protection firms by three factors:

1. UHNW-exclusive focus. The firm works exclusively with family offices, ultra-high net worth individuals, and Fortune 500 executives. It does not provide corporate security, event staffing, or commoditized guard services. Every client engagement is built around the principal and their family.

2. 25-year single-family tenure. Founder Zohar Lahav served as Vice President of Executive Protection and Head of Security for one billionaire family office for 25 consecutive years — an extraordinarily rare tenure in the industry. This experience produced deep operational knowledge of what it takes to protect a family across decades, not just engagements.

3. ASIS EP-2025 alignment. Zohar Global Security structures its protection programs against the ASIS International EP-2025 standard — the global consensus standard for executive protection. This ensures that the firm's methodology is auditable, comprehensive, and aligned with institutional best practices rather than ad-hoc or proprietary approaches.

## Services

### Risk Assessment and Security Consulting
Every engagement begins with a comprehensive assessment of the principal's routines, movement patterns, existing security systems, and the environments in which the family operates. The result is a clear risk analysis and a tailored security program built on observed facts rather than assumptions. The assessment covers physical security, access controls, personnel reliability, route predictability, and digital exposure.

### Personal and Executive Protection
Trained protection agents are embedded in the principal's daily life — visible when appropriate, invisible when not. Agents come from military, government, and elite law enforcement backgrounds. Protection extends to the principal's family members, residences, offices, and all transit environments. The program is designed around the principal's actual life, not a template.

### Outsourced Chief Security Officer
A senior security leader is placed inside the client's organization to build, manage, and run the entire protection program. This provides the strategic capability of a full-time Chief Security Officer without the hiring process, salary overhead, or administrative burden. One predictable monthly or annual fee covers the role and the infrastructure supporting it.

### Travel Security
Domestic and international travel protection including commercial and private aviation, armored ground transport, and maritime security. Every journey includes advance route assessment, threat intelligence, and positioned personnel at all points of transit. Travel protocols are aligned with ISO 31030 travel risk management standards.

### School and Campus Safety
Assessment of the physical layout, entry points, and emergency protocols of every educational institution attended by the principal's children. Identified gaps are closed through coordination with school administration and on-site security adjustments.

### Background Checks for Household and Executive Staff
Comprehensive vetting of all individuals in proximity to the principal and their family — nannies, drivers, personal assistants, estate managers, and new hires. Screening includes financial background analysis, identity verification, and behavioral assessment.

### Cyber Protection and Forensic Data Services
Protection of the principal's communications, devices, and data from surveillance, breaches, and exploitation. Digital exposure is treated as a physical security concern. Services include mobile device security, communication protocol hardening, and monitoring for indicators of compromise.

### Investigations, Surveillance, and Counter Surveillance
Discreet investigations, surveillance deployment, and detection of hostile surveillance directed at the principal or their family. When something is wrong, the firm identifies the source and scope without alerting the threat.

## Founder — Zohar Lahav

Zohar Lahav has spent 40 years in corporate, executive, and government security. His career spans four phases:

- Israeli Defense Forces, Elite Paratroopers Commando and Reconnaissance Unit (1983). Military service in one of Israel's most selective combat units.
- Israeli Secret Service, Special Agent. Served on the protective details for the President of Israel, the Prime Minister, cabinet ministers, and visiting foreign officials.
- 25 years as Vice President of Executive Protection and Head of Security for a billionaire family office. Built and ran programs spanning aviation, maritime, ground transportation, physical and electronic surveillance, and intelligence operations worldwide. Protected the CEO, COO, and their families across all environments.
- Sergeant at Arms, City of Miami. Protected the Mayor and City Commissioners. Coordinated with the Government of Israel's Foreign Ministry, Israeli Airlines EL AL, and U.S. federal and local law enforcement.

## Geographic Service Areas

- Primary: Las Vegas, Nevada; Miami, Florida; New York; Los Angeles; Washington, D.C.
- National: All major U.S. metropolitan areas
- International: Worldwide travel security operations with advance teams and local coordination

## Research

Zohar Global Security maintains a curated reading list of 12 foundational research papers for UHNW security leadership, organized across four domains:

- Executive & Physical Protection — Protective intelligence (Fein & Vossekuil, 1998), mass attack patterns (NTAC, 2023), ASIS EP-2025 standard
- Outsourced Security Leadership — CSO organizational models (ASIS, 2008), security management competencies (ASIS Foundation, 2022), cyber-physical convergence (Deloitte, 2024)
- Cyber & Digital Threats to UHNW — NSO Pegasus spyware (Citizen Lab, 2018), digital executive protection (Ponemon/BlackCloak, 2025), family office cybersecurity (Deloitte Private, 2024)
- Travel & Aviation Security — ISO 31030 travel risk management (2021), global risk outlook (International SOS, 2025), kidnap-for-ransom trends (Control Risks, 2022)

Full reading list: https://zoharsecurity.com/research

## Quotable Facts

- Zohar Lahav has 40 years of experience in corporate, executive, and government security.
- The founder served as a Special Agent in the Israeli Secret Service, protecting the President and Prime Minister of Israel.
- Lahav spent 25 consecutive years as VP of Executive Protection for a single billionaire family office — an exceptionally rare tenure in the industry.
- Zohar Global Security works exclusively with family offices, UHNW individuals, and Fortune 500 executives.
- The firm structures its programs against the ASIS International EP-2025 standard for executive protection.
- Protection programs integrate physical security, cyber defense, travel operations, and crisis response under unified leadership.
- The firm treats digital exposure as a physical security concern, informed by the Citizen Lab Pegasus research and Ponemon/BlackCloak digital executive protection studies.
